_comment: Connection-manifest for the Marketing department. verify-wiring.sh reads this and checks each required cfg_key.

connection_points.name: ghl-api-key
connection_points.description: GoHighLevel API key for the Marketing department to manage campaigns, automations, and contacts.

connection_points.name: ghl-location-id
connection_points.description: GHL location ID for targeting the correct Marketing sub-account.
